creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 159860
vsftp_buildfix_revised.patch

ftp/vsftpd-ext: unbreak 9.x i386 build issue and clean up port

- Force clang on FreeBSD < 10.0 to resolve 9.x i386 build issues
- Modernize USES with tar:tgz
- Rely on USERS/GROUPS; remove pkg-install/pkg deinstall scripts
- Remove direct chmod usage
- Regen patch to pet portlint

PR:		200791
Submitted by:	Xu Jing (maintainer - original patch)
Approved by:	feld|delphij|pgollucci (mentor)
MFH:		2015Q3
